sn45.34:3.1: These verses also occur in the context of the seven awakening factors (SN 46.17:2.1), the tenfold path (AN 10.117:2.1, AN 10.118:3.1), the ten ways of skillful deeds (AN 10.169:3.1, AN 10.170:2.1), and as independent verses (Dhp 85–89).
sn45.34:7.2: For “awakening factors” the Pali has sambodhiyaṅga, which is a different spelling of sambojjhaṅga, familiar from the “seven awakening factors”.
